'''navomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylosylprotein|xylosylprotein]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-v-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylosylprotein|xylosylprotein]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| navomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nævemeth|nævemeth]] || [[word:nævemej|nævemej]] || [[word:nævemesh|nævemesh]] || [[word:næveme|næveme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:navovomoth|navovomoth]] || [[word:navovomoj|navovomoj]] || [[word:navovomosh|navovomosh]] || [[word:navovomo|navovomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:navomoth|navomoth]] || [[word:navomoj|navomoj]] || [[word:navomosh|navomosh]] || [[word:navomo|navomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:navofmoth|navofmoth]] || [[word:navofmoj|navofmoj]] || [[word:navofmosh|navofmosh]] || [[word:navofmof|navofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:navomotho|navomotho]] || [[word:navomojo|navomojo]] || [[word:navomosho|navomosho]] || [[word:navomoko|navomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:navomoth|navomoth]] || [[word:navomoj|navomoj]] || [[word:navomosh|navomosh]] || [[word:navomo|navomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:navomothol|navomothol]] || [[word:navomojol|navomojol]] || [[word:navomoshol|navomoshol]] || [[word:navomokol|navomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:navomothotho|navomothotho]] || [[word:navomojojo|navomojojo]] || [[word:navomoshosho|navomoshosho]] || [[word:navomoko|navomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:navomothon|navomothon]] || [[word:navomojon|navomojon]] || [[word:navomoshon|navomoshon]] || [[word:navomokon|navomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:navomothoro|navomothoro]] || [[word:navomojoro|navomojoro]] || [[word:navomoshoro|navomoshoro]] || [[word:navomokoro|navomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
